documentation.description:
Smart Battery information (static/infrequent update). Use for updates
from: smart battery to flight stack, flight stack to GCS. Use
BATTERY_STATUS for the frequent battery updates.

record_types.name: Smart_Battery_Info

fields.name: Capacity_Full_Specification
fields.description:
Units: [mAh]
Capacity when full according to manufacturer, -1: field not
provided.

fields.name: Capacity_Full
fields.description:
Units: [mAh]
Capacity when full (accounting for battery degradation), -1: field
not provided.

fields.name: Cycle_Count
fields.description: Charge/discharge cycle count. UINT16_MAX: field not provided.

fields.name: Serial_Number
fields.description:
Serial number in ASCII characters, 0 terminated. All 0: field not
provided.

fields.name: Device_Name
fields.description:
Static device name in ASCII characters, 0 terminated. All 0: field
not provided. Encode as manufacturer name then product name
separated using an underscore.

fields.name: Weight
fields.description:
Units: [g]
Battery weight. 0: field not provided.

fields.name: Discharge_Minimum_Voltage
fields.description:
Units: [mV]
Minimum per-cell voltage when discharging. If not supplied set to
UINT16_MAX value.

fields.name: Charging_Minimum_Voltage
fields.description:
Units: [mV]
Minimum per-cell voltage when charging. If not supplied set to
UINT16_MAX value.

fields.name: Resting_Minimum_Voltage
fields.description:
Units: [mV]
Minimum per-cell voltage when resting. If not supplied set to
UINT16_MAX value.

fields.name: Charging_Maximum_Voltage
fields.description:
Units: [mV]
Maximum per-cell voltage when charged. 0: field not provided.

fields.name: Cells_In_Series
fields.description: Number of battery cells in series. 0: field not provided.

fields.name: Discharge_Maximum_Current
fields.description:
Units: [mA]
Maximum pack discharge current. 0: field not provided.

fields.name: Discharge_Maximum_Burst_Current
fields.description:
Units: [mA]
Maximum pack discharge burst current. 0: field not provided.

fields.name: Manufacture_Date
fields.description:
Manufacture date (DD/MM/YYYY) in ASCII characters, 0 terminated. All
0: field not provided.
